title: Butterfly Place Cards Hollow Wine Name Cards Pearlier Butterfly Glass Place Card Table Name Card for Wedding Party Birthday 100Pcs (White)
features: ◆Lovely and Charming: Our butterfly place card is made of high-quality pearl paper, pearl-cut hollow butterfly shape, the tail is designed with an opening that can be inserted into the cup,and the wings are slightly curved,like a real butterfly.

◆Exquisite Design: One side of the wine name card is designed with a laser-cut butterfly-shaped hollow, and the other side is a blank space for writing. You can write the guest’s name or table number in the blank.
◆Packing Size: The size of each piece of pearl butterfly glass is about 11 x 7.5 cm, including 100 pieces. Enough to meet the needs of daily and party weddings

◆Perfect Decoration: The table number glass seat card can be used for birthdays, baptisms, dinners, students, bachelor parties, weddings, New Years, etc. Can also be used as bookmarks and decorations.

◆Various Occasions: In addition to the venue cards for receptions and banquets, you can also decorate the house and paste the walls to use them as props to make your residence more warm. If you want, you can use it anywhere.
